license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gg5bty6
title: Staining protocol for unicellular protists: Mitotracker and Dapi

steps_raw.instruction: 2% PFA Fixation: Add PFA drop by drop and mixing carefully into 1mL cells for a final concentration of 2%PFA
Incubate cells for 4 min at room temperature 00:04:00
Add 1mM mitotracker dye. Room temperature, protect from light
Incubate for 10 minutes. Room temperature, protect from light 00:10:00
Add 1/1000 DAPI dye. Room temperature, protect from light
Incubate for 5 minutes. Room temperature, protect from light 00:05:00 Total incubation times: Mytotracker: 15min DAPI: 5min
Centrifuge at 1000g for 5 minutes and resuspend with 1xPBS 00:05:00
Mount your slide and ready for observation!
